name: Buff Mult 1U
description: Dual 1x4 buffered multiple. The upper input normals to the lower section, so one source can fan out to eight accurate, isolated copies for pitch-critical or high-impedance routing.

inputs.name: Top IN
inputs.description: Upper section input. Normalled to the lower section input when the lower jack is empty.

inputs.name: Bottom IN
inputs.description: Lower section input. Receives its own 1x4 buffered copy set.

behaviors.name: Eight accurate copies
behaviors.trigger: patch a source into Top IN with Bottom IN empty
behaviors.description: The module behaves as a single 1x8 buffered mult and preserves voltage accuracy across all eight outputs.

behaviors.name: Dual-source mode
behaviors.description: The upper and lower sections become two independent 1x4 buffered multiples.

behaviors.name: Pitch-safe fanout
behaviors.description: Buffered outputs are isolated and stable enough for oscillator pitch distribution.

behaviors.name: Fault isolation
behaviors.trigger: short or load one output heavily
behaviors.description: The buffered design keeps faults or unusual loads from directly collapsing the source signal.

patchIdeas.name: Pitch bus splitter
patchIdeas.patch: One sequencer pitch CV fans out to four oscillators without drift · bottom section can carry a second melody or transpose bus.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Buff Mult 1U:
* Top IN: pitch bus
* Bottom IN: transpose bus

Sequencer:
VCO 1:
VCO 2:
VCO 3:
VCO 4:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Buff Mult 1U (Top IN)
- Buff Mult 1U (Top OUT 1) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Buff Mult 1U (Top OUT 2) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct)
- Buff Mult 1U (Top OUT 3) p> VCO 3 (V/Oct)
- Buff Mult 1U (Top OUT 4) p> VCO 4 (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: One LFO, many destinations
patchIdeas.patch: One LFO drives cutoff, pan, and VCA CV at the same time · buffered copies keep the modulation shape stable across multiple loads.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Buff Mult 1U:
* Top IN: LFO

LFO:
Filter:
VCA:
Pan:
Output:

- LFO (Out) >> Buff Mult 1U (Top IN)
- Buff Mult 1U (Top OUT 1) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Buff Mult 1U (Top OUT 2) >> VCA (CV)
- Buff Mult 1U (Top OUT 3) >> Pan (CV)
- Buff Mult 1U (Top OUT 4) >> Output (CV)

patchIdeas.name: Dual pitch lane
patchIdeas.patch: Two independent sequencer outputs feed two oscillator banks · one module handles both pitch lanes without a passive mult.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Buff Mult 1U:
* Top IN: voice A pitch
* Bottom IN: voice B pitch

Sequencer A:
Sequencer B:
VCO 1:
VCO 2:
VCO 3:
VCO 4:

- Sequencer A (Pitch) p> Buff Mult 1U (Top IN)
- Sequencer B (Pitch) p> Buff Mult 1U (Bottom IN)
- Buff Mult 1U (Top OUT 1) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Buff Mult 1U (Top OUT 2) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct)
- Buff Mult 1U (Bottom OUT 1) p> VCO 3 (V/Oct)
- Buff Mult 1U (Bottom OUT 2) p> VCO 4 (V/Oct)
